children.name: test_never_lost_under_chaos[persist.unexpected_crash]
parameters: _Chaos(id='persist.unexpected_crash', patches=[('dinary.background.classification.task.parse_receipt', {'return_value': ParsedReceipt(store_name='', store_pib='', total_amount=100.0, invoice_number='INV-PIPE', items=[ReceiptItem(name_raw='HLEB', unit_price=100.0, quantity=1.0, total_price=100.0, tax_label='E')], items_total=100.0, total_ok=True, used_journal_fallback=False, purchase_datetime=None)}), ('dinary.background.classification.task.classify_receipt', {'return_value': ClassifyOutcome(results=[ClassificationResult(item_name_normalized='hleb', category_id=1, confidence_level=3, alternative_category_ids=[], tag_ids=[])], broker_unavailable=False, execution_failed=False, execution=<dinary.adapters.llmbroker.Execution object at 0x7f94549317f0>)}), ('dinary.background.classification.persist.persist_classification_results', {'side_effect': RuntimeError('persist internal error')})])

children.name: test_roundtrip[payload2]
parameters: [{'year': 2022, 'ok': True, 'accounting_currency': 'EUR', 'total_sheet_acc': 1200.0, 'total_db_acc': 1200.0, 'months_in_sheet': 12, 'months_in_db': 12, 'month_diffs': []}, {'year': 2023, 'ok': False, 'accounting_currency': 'EUR', 'total_sheet_acc': 1200.0, 'total_db_acc': 1180.0, 'months_in_sheet': 12, 'months_in_db': 12, 'month_diffs': [{'month': 6, 'sheet_acc': 100.0, 'db_acc': 80.0, 'diff': 20.0}]}, {'year': 2019, 'ok': False, 'error': 'no entry for year 2024'}]
